command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== WORKING TREE STATUS ON VM-MEMORY ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git status --short | head -30" 2>&1

echo '=== EXISTING .gitignore ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/moreno-ai/.gitignore 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo 'no .gitignore'" 2>&1

echo '=== IS config/moreno-governed-tasks.json TRACKED? ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git ls-files config/moreno-governed-tasks.json && echo tracked || echo untracked" 2>&1

echo DONE_1924
